CustomField.description: Manually populated by reps to indicate confidence towards activating on SaaS.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: (Blank): Customer has not had a Kickoff Call or Initial Billing Training and therefore does not have an agreed-upon timeline. High: Indicates a high-velocity customer (ie, a “go-getter”) and/or a customer who has been committed to their timeline and has 1-2 funnel stages left to complete Medium: Indicates a customer who has 1-2 funnel stages left to complete and/or but has not completed their next steps on time. A risk that they do not activate on schedule Low: customer whose timeline is out of date
CustomField.label: SaaS Activation Confidence
